head.title: Breach of Contract and Unlawful Deduction from Wages for Employers | Moonstone Advocates
head.description: When employment contracts are broken or wages are withheld without clear consent, things can escalate quickly. We help employers prevent disputes from arising, and act fast to resolve any breach of contract or unlawful deduction claims when they do. Our employment solicitors work with businesses of all sizes to draft compliant contracts, include lawful pay clauses, and resolve pay-related issues confidently and efficiently.

blocks.html:
Breach of Contract and Unlawful Deduction from Wages for Employers

When employment contracts are broken or wages are withheld without clear consent, things can escalate quickly. We help employers prevent disputes from arising, and act fast to resolve any breach of contract or unlawful deduction claims when they do. Our employment solicitors work with businesses of all sizes to draft compliant contracts, include lawful pay clauses, and resolve pay-related issues confidently and efficiently.

Speak to an expert

Home
For businesses
Breach of Contract and Unlawful Deduction from Wages for Employers

Employment contract drafting and review

We draft, review, and update employment contracts to make sure all key terms are clear, legally sound, and tailored to your business. That includes pay, bonuses, commission, notice periods, and procedures.

‍

Lawful deduction clauses

We create clear deduction clauses that that meet statutory rules, secure consent, and reduce unlawful deduction risks.

‍

Contractual payment advice

Get immediate advice on pay issues linked to employment contracts. We cover salary, holiday pay, notice pay, redundancy entitlements, and more.

‍

Early dispute resolution

We act quickly to resolve disputes around pay or contracts before they escalate. Our team aims to settle issues through early negotiation wherever possible.

‍

ACAS and tribunal representation

If a claim is made, we’ll represent you throughout the process. That includes pre-claim talks, ACAS Early Conciliation, and defending Employment Tribunal proceedings.

‍

Settlement agreements

We draft and negotiate settlement agreements that resolve disputes quickly and confidentially, helping protect your business and reduce future risk.

‍

Questions we’re often asked

Speak to an expert
What is a breach of contract?

Failure to follow agreed contractual terms, procedures, or notice obligations.

What is an unlawful deduction from wages?

Pay withheld or reduced without contractual authority or the employee’s prior written consent.

Can employers ever deduct pay lawfully?

Yes, with clear contractual terms, employee consent, or statutory authority.

Do we need to consult before changing terms?

Usually yes. Consult, justify business reasons, and follow any contractual variation process.

What are time limits for Tribunal claims?

Typically three months less one day but ACAS Early Conciliation pauses time.

What remedies might employees seek?

Repayment of wages and damages for losses caused by the breach.
